sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka thei hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhiazo,
Sun le zan kum sawtpi ka puak hizo;
ka zuat ciang, A kammalte ka muan ciang,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka nuam hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhia
Ka nuam hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhia

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka thei hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhiazo,
Ka van bei theilo di’n ka um

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka thei hi, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhiazo,
Hepih tokhom ka zuan a, Jesuh maipha ka muta,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: La ka sa, ka vangik khempeuh tukkhia zo,
Sun le zanin ka lung hong damsak
Kumpipa a ding ka hing, lungdam la asasa hing,
